name: ad-testing
description: Static CodeTube site — single Home page (recent videos) and /watch/?id=ID watch page.

scripts.install: echo "✅ ad-testing: static site — no external dependencies to install"
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html CNAME data.js dist/ && cp -R watch dist/ && cp logo-light.png dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
